calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Tsang, Esq. 415-636-1323 special appearance for counsel John Kenosian - 323-297-2100. Plaintiff WESTERN STATES ADJUSTERS,(via Zoom)
Erik Otten, 650-745-5623 Defendant in Pro Per.

Hearing is held. The Court poses questions to Mr. Otten re: expenses. Mr. Otten responds. Mr. Tsang present arguments re: outstanding credit card debt. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WESTERN STATES ADJUSTERS, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION of Erik A. Otten.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant/judgment debtor ERIK A. OTTEN (Tel: 415-917-7225) present;
No other appearances made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENY CREDITOR WESTERN STATES ADJUSTERS, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court indicates that Mr. Otten did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling or inform the opposing side of his intent to appear today.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Otten's claim of exemption is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release the $329.15 and whatever other sums that it is currently holding to the plaintiff creditor. $50 per pay period ($100 per month) shall be withheld from defendant's pay and shall be remitted to plaintiff creditor.

Order signed.

Copies of order mailed out to parties and San Francisco County Sheriff's Office on July 25, 2022.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kerri Morris, Esq. specially appearing for plaintiff, by Court Call;
Erik Otten, T:415.359.6117, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The tentative ruling was uncontested. The Court allows plaintiff's counsel to state her objections. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, as follows:

Debtor Otten's claim of exemption is granted. The Sheriff is directed to withhold $25/pay period ($50/month) from Otten's earnings.

Order signed. The Clerk shall serve as copy of the order to all parties, including a certified copy to the levying officer.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
